title: Ashmūn Heat Wave
lead: Ashmūn is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.09. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Ashmūn has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 13.3 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 23%, which is relatively low, and the wind speed is moderate at 13.2 km/h. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 0.0 GG, indicating no need for heating, while the CDD value is significantly high, leading to increased energy consumption.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the effects of the heat wave immediately.
